title: Royalford 3L Stainless Steel Airpot, Insulated Vacuum Thermal Flask Jug | Pump Action Airpot, Thermal Coffee Flask | Ideal for Hot & Cold Drinks, Soup | Extra Strong for Catering Travel Commercial
features: DOUBLE WALLED INSULATION - Keep your hot drinks hot, and cold drinks cold for long hours. The double walled structure of the airpot retains the temperature of the contents preventing heat loss for hot drinks and heat gain for chilled ones.

PUMP ACTION DISPENSING - Serving drinks is easy thanks to the pump action dispenser. Simply depress the button on the lid to pour your drink. There’s also a safety lock feature to prevent accidental pouring.

STAINLESS STEEL CONSTRUCTION - Made from stylish stainless steel on the outside and the inside, By using steel instead of glass the flask is more robust and there is less risk of breakages. Furthermore, the steel won’t discolour or absorb flavours as can happen with plastic flasks.
LONG HEAT AND COLD RETENTION - The vacuum insulation technology locks in temperature to preserve flavour and freshness, that keeps beverages hot or cold for long hours.
QUALITY - Our double walled thermal airpot is made up of a durable stainless-steel interior and exterior, built to withstand the demands of everyday use.
description: Product Description 3L CAPACITY 3L Airpot is the ideal solution for keeping water tea coffee soup and other beverages hot or cold for long periods. KEEPS HOT FOR 14 HOURS Keep your hot drinks hot drinks for long hours. KEEPS COLD FOR 20 HOURS Keep your cold drinks cold drinks for long hours. BPA FREE MATERIALS It comes with BPA free materials to ensure your safety. PORTABLE HANDLE It has a portable handle to make it easy to carry anywhere. EASY PUMP MECHANISM Serving drinks is easy thanks to the pump action dispenser. DOUBLE WALL VACUUM INSULATION The double walled structure of the airpot retains the temperature of the contents preventing heat loss for hot drinks and heat gain for chilled ones. IDEAL FOR HOME OR OFFICE USE Great for offices and functions as well as for family use at home.
